settings.question: Is COD available?
settings.answer: COD can be offered for selected areas and items depending on order value, courier limits, and stock confirmation.

settings.question: Do you accept GCash, Maya, cards, and bank transfer?
settings.answer: Yes. Enable the payment methods available to your Shopify store and update this answer with final payment instructions.

settings.question: Can you check if parts are compatible?
settings.answer: Yes. Send your current build or target parts list before ordering CPUs, motherboards, RAM, GPUs, PSUs, coolers, and cases.

settings.question: Do you handle bulk orders?
settings.answer: Use the contact page for team laptops, office peripherals, workstations, and recurring procurement requests.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.intro: Answers for delivery, payments, warranty, compatibility, and bulk buying.
